dashboard.label: DropWatch — Agentic Drop Observability
dashboard.description: Native Splunk view of ZeroDrop flash-drop health. Telemetry arrives via HEC (index zerodrop, sourcetype zerodrop:telemetry). The scheduled detector alerts in this app (Settings > Searches, reports, and alerts) run the same logic continuously; this dashboard is the human-facing companion.

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry (event=waitlist_add OR event=checkout) $drop:dropId$ | stats count(eval(event="waitlist_add")) as waitlist_adds count(eval(event="checkout")) as checkouts | eval conversion=round(100*checkouts/(checkouts+waitlist_adds),0) | fields conversion

panel.title: Claim rate / min vs baseline — stampede onset

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry event=claim $drop:dropId$ | timechart span=1m count as claims_per_min | eventstats median(claims_per_min) as baseline | eval baseline=if(baseline<1,1,baseline) | eval stampede_threshold=baseline*4
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop:dropId$ | timechart span=1m count by event

panel.title: Oversell-reject attempts by /24 subnet — bot clusters

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry event=oversell_reject $drop:dropId$ | eval subnet=replace(ip,"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)\.\d+","\1.0/24") | eventstats count as total_rejects | stats count as rejects, dc(ip) as distinct_ips, max(total_rejects) as total_rejects by subnet | eval share=round(100*rejects/total_rejects,0) | sort - rejects | eval bot_signal=if(rejects>=10 AND share>=25,"LIKELY BOT CLUSTER","") | table subnet rejects distinct_ips share bot_signal
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry (event=hold_create OR event=hold_expiry) $drop:dropId$ | timechart span=1m count by event

panel.title: DynamoDB write latency (p95 / avg per min)

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry latencyMs=* $drop:dropId$ | timechart span=1m perc95(latencyMs) as p95_ms avg(latencyMs) as avg_ms
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop:dropId$ | table _time event dropName ip position buyer latencyMs | sort - _time | head 100
